title: Security Awareness & Professional Training
description: Training materials and programs to build a security-aware culture and develop GRC professional skills

resources.title: Phishing Awareness Training Module
resources.description: Ready-to-deploy phishing awareness training module covering identification techniques, reporting procedures, and simulated phishing scenarios.

resources.title: NIST CSF 2.0 Practitioner Course Materials
resources.description: Comprehensive course materials for NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0 covering the new Govern function and updated subcategories.

resources.title: GRC Analyst Certification Prep Kit
resources.description: Study materials and practice exams for major GRC certifications including CISA, CRISC, CGEIT, and ISO 27001 Lead Implementer.

resources.title: Board Cybersecurity Literacy Workshop
resources.description: Facilitation guide and presentation deck for delivering a board-level cybersecurity literacy workshop covering governance roles, risk oversight, and incident response.

resources.title: Enterprise Security Culture Program
resources.description: Annual security awareness program framework including role-based training tracks, metrics and measurement, gamification strategies, and executive reporting.
